task_description: Implement Phase 2 (Real Auth with production crypto) and Phase 3 (Fastify HTTP Layer) of the Quant-Ecosystem production transformation. Phase 2 replaces all toy crypto (djb2, Math.random) with jose, argon2, otplib, and Node.js crypto. Phase 3 creates a new Fastify-based server-core package and converts QuantMail identity routes to use it.

verification.summary: All 109 tests pass (46 auth + 7 server-core + 15 quantmail-api-v2 + 42 database). TypeScript compiles cleanly. v2 review issues resolved: shared TokenService, production config validation, Dockerfile main field fix, OAuth 501.

fixes: Created shared services.ts module with single TokenService instance used by both auth and oauth routes
Added production JWT_SECRET validation in getConfig() - throws if missing when env=production
Dockerfile now rewrites package.json main fields from src/ to dist/ after tsc compilation
OAuth authorization_code grant returns 501 Not Implemented instead of 200 with placeholder
